name: Determine Pharma Supply Chain Transportation Policy
description: This process determines the transportation policy for pharmaceutical products, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements such as GxP, GMP, GDP, and ICH Q10, while maintaining batch traceability, audit trails, and validation documentation
sector_specific_kpis: delivery time to patient or distribution center
regulatory_requirements: ICH Q10 for pharmaceutical quality systems
21 CFR Part 11 for electronic records and signatures
notes: All automated decisions must be validated and documented per GxP, with a focus on batch traceability, audit trails, and electronic signatures. The system must also ensure that all transportation protocols are qualified and validated to prevent temperature excursions and ensure product stability
